form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by a nose in a Mix 1/2/3 last start at this track, clocking a slick 29.77 over the 520m trip. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Eye-catching performance to score by a nose in a Mix 1/2/3 last start at this track, clocking a slick 29.77 over the 520m trip. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together shortly after the start and again entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at The Meadows to win by 4.5 lengths in 29.97, beating Scott Sigma. Last start finished 4th on April 4 over 520m at this track behind Overflow Beau beaten 6 lengths (30.21) in a Mix 1/2/3. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at The Meadows to win by 4.5 lengths in 29.97, beating Scott Sigma. Last start finished 4th on April 4 over 520m at this track behind Overflow Beau beaten 6 lengths (30.21) in a Mix 1/2/3. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Well supported last time and ran up to expectations, burning early to score a neck win at this track over 520m in 29.76. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well supported last time and ran up to expectations, burning early to score a neck win at this track over 520m in 29.76. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Went down narrowly in a Mix 1/2/3 at this track latest when a neck second but did record a slick 29.78 over the 520m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Went down narrowly in a Mix 1/2/3 at this track latest when a neck second but did record a slick 29.78 over the 520m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and was slow to begin.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (30.02) over 520m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (30.02) over 520m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (29.78) when second at this track in a Mix 1/2/3. Goes very well from the draw boasting four victories and eight places from 18 starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (29.78) when second at this track in a Mix 1/2/3. Goes very well from the draw boasting four victories and eight places from 18 starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Overflow Beau at this track last start over 520m (29.96). Right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when third behind Overflow Beau at this track last start over 520m (29.96). Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth over 520m at this track, beaten 8 lengths (30.32) behind Sammy Ethan in a Mix 1/2/3 on April 4. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fourth over 520m at this track, beaten 8 lengths (30.32) behind Sammy Ethan in a Mix 1/2/3 on April 4. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by a neck at The Gardens (29.62) beating Modest Man in a NG on March 21. Risky starter, safely held last time and looking to others.

formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by a neck at The Gardens (29.62) beating Modest Man in a NG on March 21. Risky starter, safely held last time and looking to others.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 520m. Needs to find a bit more to test these.
